name: 4Ever Golf
about: 4Ever Golf is an indoor golf venue featuring TrackMan 4 simulators, offering a high-tech, year-round golf experience. The venue operates 24/7 with no closing hours, providing access to new world-class courses added monthly. It is designed for training, competition, and social play, with locations in Dudley and Holden, Massachusetts.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with no closing hours for flexible play
Powered by high-accuracy TrackMan 4 simulators for premium technology
Multiple bays available at two convenient locations in Massachusetts
Option to join leagues and host events or parties

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own food and drinks.
BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own alcoholic beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-accuracy simulators with monthly new course additions

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, 4Ever Golf operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace, but typically it takes about 2-3 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 4Ever Golf is kid-friendly and welcomes families to enjoy the indoor golf experience together.
